title: Entity Stack Rendering
description: A performance mod that massively boosts fps when dealing with a large amount of entities in the same place
body:
Entity Stack Rendering massively boosts FPS by detecting groups of entities occupying the same position and rendering only one of them, displaying a count label (×N) above the stack instead. Supports minecarts, boats, armor stands, and all mobs. All entities remain fully functional; interactions, collision, and AI are unaffected. Client-side only, no server required.
Join the dc server to request updates. Latest release is provided
